description_long: This is a compact promotional kiosk for Nutella, constructed primarily from white panels adorned with printed graphics and branding. The front features a large Nutella logo, Hebrew text, and images of Nutella jars, with a prominent header sign above the main counter. The kiosk has two open counter spaces for serving or displaying products, and the lower panels are decorated with additional Nutella branding and simple line art illustrations of fruit and birds. The sides are solid, with more branding and illustrations, and the back is similarly decorated, making the kiosk visually appealing from all angles. The structure appears lightweight and portable, suitable for temporary placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or event spaces. There are no visible windows or doors, and the roof is flat and integrated with the header sign.
description: A white, branded Nutella promotional kiosk with a flat roof, open counters, and bold printed signage on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Nutella branding, large header sign, and two open counter spaces.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the Nutella logo, line art illustrations, and the depth of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional Nutella branding, header sign, and decorative illustrations.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with Nutella logo and line art illustrations.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; large header sign above counter, printed branding on front, sides, and rear panels; visible text includes 'nutella' and Hebrew promotional text.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof integrated with header sign, made of the same laminated material, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist promotional style with clean lines and bold branding.
